strategic_objective: Determine the stability and origin of strong linear dependencies among feature pairs and their impact on dataset redundancy.
key_checks: Evaluate dependency concentration and correlation stability of key feature pairs across temporal segments
Distinguish dependencies arising from inherent protocol structure versus preprocessing or feature engineering
Quantify redundancy impact by measuring effective dimensionality reduction from these dependencies
success_criteria: Clear evidence on whether dependencies are stable or transient
Understanding of dependency sources (protocol vs. preprocessing)
Assessment of redundancy level and implications for feature representation
router_constraints: preserve feature_scope for all involved features (e13-e22)
preserve evidence refs related to e13 through e22
